entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that lowers cereal yield in small-holder farms in Africa

entities.name: CEREAL YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of cereal crops

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The region where small-holder farms are affected by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop susceptible to Striga hermonthica infection

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist infection by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: TRIPSACUM DACTYLOIDES
entities.description: A wild relative of maize that exhibits resistance to Striga hermonthica

entities.name: ZEA MAYS-T. DACTYLOIDES HYBRID
entities.description: A hybrid between Zea mays and Tripsacum dactyloides

entities.name: INFECTION
entities.description: The process of Striga hermonthica parasitizing a host plant

entities.name: HAUSTORIAL TISSUE DIFFERENTIATION
entities.description: The development of haustorial tissues for parasite attachment

entities.name: VASCULAR CONTINUITY
entities.description: The establishment of a vascular connection between the parasite and the host

entities.name: SECONDARY HAUSTORIA FORMATION
entities.description: The development of secondary haustoria for further host attachment

entities.name: INHIBITORY SIGNAL
entities.description: A mobile signal produced by T. dactyloides that inhibits haustorial development
